_genesis: 2026-06-04 GB structured-suggestion feed per THREAD hopper-feed-iron-clad-proposal-request. Schema: ts, source_cyl, source_entry_hash, lane (book:Sx | tooling | private-learning | coordination), series_ref (tight), one_line_intent (tight one-liner), lgp_hint (1-3 tags), priority (high|normal|low), ref (hmc: or thread:). GB sole append writer. Tiger/Hopper consumer. KM ratifies via packet. Starts honest MOCK until one real cycle. See GB proposal in THREAD [8] for full fields + rationale. LGP north-star.

one_line_intent: Flow Polish Round 2: after Apply auto-reload current PDF in Atrium (or prominent reload banner) so user sees changes without manual refresh/re-browse.
Card states (Processing, Diffs Ready, Sealed) must persist across page refreshes; no reset on reload.
Make cards kanban-like: compact summaries in vertical swimlanes (Needs Me | Processing | Diffs Ready | Sealed), click to expand for full history/details in single bundle.
Wire FEC Packet (ATR-FEC-001) as live example in Review / Live Ledger (dynamic from obligation ledger + breath-gate), not static.
After Approve/Apply in Atrium, PDF source updates but rendered Atrium view does not auto-refresh — user must manually refresh + re-Browse PDF to see changes in cockpit.

FEC Packet review card (ATR-FEC-001) surfaced as visible Atrium review card per G directive — static lens for now (mirrors sealed packet with B51 trace, LGP, citations); next to wire live to obligation ledger + breath-gate.

Expanded cards must feel like the original FEC mock: rich story summary at top, full details/history, clean integrated disposition buttons (Accept / Refine / Dismiss) in the card itself, diffs shown in-place.
"Processed — no change" cards: show clear one-line reason + easy Dismiss inside the card; allow user disposition instead of system shutting down without visibility.
After successful Apply: show "✓ Applied + PDF recompiled" banner with auto-reload button (or attempt auto-reload of current PDF viewer) so changes are visible without manual refresh + re-Browse.
Kanban clarity: one logical change = one primary card in the swimlanes (compact summary, click expand for details); no orphaned lists or sprawl outside the lanes.
FEC-style cards: when expanded, tell the full story (B51 handoff trace, LGP, citations, source, disposition) with integrated actions; diffs in the card, not dropped below or hard to find.

Card Experience Polish Round 2: make expanded cards match the rich original FEC mock (story, details, buttons in-card, diffs in-place); processed no change transparent with reason + Dismiss; auto-reload PDF banner; uniform primary cards in kanban lanes.
